name: heatcheck
title: Heat Check
description: See what's burning your CPU and spinning your fan
author: kumamaki

commands.name: heat-check
commands.title: Check Heat
commands.subtitle: Heat Check
commands.description: See what's burning your CPU and spinning your fan

commands.name: diagnosis
commands.title: AI Diagnosis
commands.subtitle: Heat Check
commands.description: Ask AI to explain what's making your Mac run hot

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
